title: Long Noncoding RNA AFAP1-AS1 Aggravates Immunotherapy Resistance in NSCLC by Enhancing JAK2 and TYK2 Translation
author: Xiong, Wei
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains the complete set of  RNA‑seq processing scripts, FCS files, and uncropped Western blots images supporting the findings presented in our manuscript entitled"Long Noncoding RNA AFAP1-AS1 Aggravates Immunotherapy Resistance in NSCLC by Enhancing JAK2 and TYK2 Translation". 
 RNA‑seq processing scripts: Complete shell and R scripts for read trimming, alignment, and differential expression analysis, with software versions and execution steps documented. 
 Flow Cytometry Data (FCS files): Raw FCS files from all independent experiments, organized by experimental group and provided as compressed archives (.zip). 
 Western blot raw images: Uncropped Western blot images, organized by experimental group and corresponding figure panel (main and supplementary figures), provided as a single PDF file.
